svg.text: EU AI Act + GDPR Compliance Auditor · Local-first · No external API calls
React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS — served by Nginx · Port 80
Upload Wizard · Dashboard · Article Detail · Classifier Metrics · Audit Polling (2 s)
FastAPI 0.111 · Uvicorn · Pydantic v2 · Python 3.11 · structlog
e5-small cosine similarity vs article topic query
selects 3 best query chunks from N domain chunks
BM25 top-10 keyword + ChromaDB vector top-10
queries regulatory KB filtered by article_num
ChromaDB — regulatory KB (never stores user docs)
BERT specialist models (actor · risk · prohibited · article classifier)
Privacy: uploaded file deleted immediately after audit · ChromaDB holds only regulatory text · in-memory audit store · no external API calls
Triton is optional (GPU) · Ollama is default (CPU) · all LLM calls use temperature=0, seed=42, top_k=1 for deterministic output
